metadata.name: recharge__billing_history
metadata.comment: Each record represents an order, enriched with metrics about related charges and line items.

order_id.name: order_id
order_id.comment: The unique identifier of the order.

external_order_id_ecommerce.name: external_order_id_ecommerce
external_order_id_ecommerce.comment: The ID for the order in your external ecommerce platform.

external_order_number_ecommerce.name: external_order_number_ecommerce
external_order_number_ecommerce.comment: The order number in your external ecommerce platform.

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.comment: Unique numeric identifier for the customer associated with the order.

email.name: email
email.comment: The email address of the customer.

order_created_at.name: order_created_at
order_created_at.comment: The date and time the order was created.

order_status.name: order_status
order_status.comment: The status of the order. Possible values are SUCCESS, ERROR, QUEUED, CANCELLED.

order_updated_at.name: order_updated_at
order_updated_at.comment: The date and time the order was last updated.

charge_id.name: charge_id
charge_id.comment: The unique identifier of the charge.

transaction_id.name: transaction_id
transaction_id.comment: The unique identifier of the transaction.

charge_status.name: charge_status
charge_status.comment: The status of the charge. Possible values are SUCCESS, ERROR, QUEUED, SKIPPED, REFUNDED, PARTIALLY_REFUNDED.

is_prepaid.name: is_prepaid
is_prepaid.comment: Boolean indicating if the Order is prepaid.

order_total_price.name: order_total_price
order_total_price.comment: The total amount due of the order.

order_processed_at.name: order_processed_at
order_processed_at.comment: The date and time the order was processed.

order_scheduled_at.name: order_scheduled_at
order_scheduled_at.comment: The date time of when the associated order is/was scheduled to process.

order_shipped_date.name: order_shipped_date
order_shipped_date.comment: The date and time the order was shipped.

address_id.name: address_id
address_id.comment: The unique identifier of the address.

_fivetran_deleted.name: _fivetran_deleted
_fivetran_deleted.comment: Boolean created by Fivetran to indicate whether the record has been deleted.

charge_created_at.name: charge_created_at
charge_created_at.comment: The date and time the charge was created.

payment_processor.name: payment_processor
payment_processor.comment: The name of the payment processor.

tags.name: tags
tags.comment: A comma-separated list of tags on the charge.

orders_count.name: orders_count
orders_count.comment: The number of orders generated from this charge (Will be >1 for prepaid).

charge_total_price.name: charge_total_price
charge_total_price.comment: The total amount due of the charge.

calculated_order_total_price.name: calculated_order_total_price
calculated_order_total_price.comment: The `charge_total_price` divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge

charge_subtotal_price.name: charge_subtotal_price
charge_subtotal_price.comment: The combined price of all charge line_items minus any discounts. Does not include taxes and shipping.

calculated_order_subtotal_price.name: calculated_order_subtotal_price
calculated_order_subtotal_price.comment: The `charge_subtotal_price` divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

charge_tax_lines.name: charge_tax_lines
charge_tax_lines.comment: The tax lines associated with the charge.

calculated_order_tax_lines.name: calculated_order_tax_lines
calculated_order_tax_lines.comment: The charge_tax_lines divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

charge_total_discounts.name: charge_total_discounts
charge_total_discounts.comment: The sum of the discounts applied to the charge.

calculated_order_total_discounts.name: calculated_order_total_discounts
calculated_order_total_discounts.comment: The charge_total_discounts divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

charge_total_refunds.name: charge_total_refunds
charge_total_refunds.comment: The sum of all refunds that were applied to the charge.

calculated_order_total_refunds.name: calculated_order_total_refunds
calculated_order_total_refunds.comment: The charge_total_refunds divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

charge_total_tax.name: charge_total_tax
charge_total_tax.comment: The total tax due associated with the charge.

calculated_order_total_tax.name: calculated_order_total_tax
calculated_order_total_tax.comment: The charge_total_tax divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

charge_total_weight_grams.name: charge_total_weight_grams
charge_total_weight_grams.comment: The total weight of all items in the charge in grams.

calculated_order_total_weight_grams.name: calculated_order_total_weight_grams
calculated_order_total_weight_grams.comment: The charge_total_weight_grams divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

charge_total_shipping.name: charge_total_shipping
charge_total_shipping.comment: The total shipping costs associated with the charge.

calculated_order_total_shipping.name: calculated_order_total_shipping
calculated_order_total_shipping.comment: The charge_total_shipping divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

order_item_quantity.name: order_item_quantity
order_item_quantity.comment: The total number of items in the order.

order_line_item_total.name: order_line_item_total
order_line_item_total.comment: The total price of all line items in the order. Does not include discounts, shipping, or tax.

total_net_charge_value.name: total_net_charge_value
total_net_charge_value.comment: The total net value of the charge, calculated as the total price minus total discounts.

total_calculated_net_order_value.name: total_calculated_net_order_value
total_calculated_net_order_value.comment: The `total_net_charge_value` divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: recharge__charge_line_item_history
metadata.comment: Each record represents a specific line item charge, refund, or other line item that accumulates into final charges.

charge_id.name: charge_id
charge_id.comment: The unique identifier of the charge.

charge_row_num.name: charge_row_num
charge_row_num.comment: Unique row number assigned to line items with the same `charge_id`.

source_index.name: source_index
source_index.comment: The line item's primary key `index` carried over from its source.

charge_created_at.name: charge_created_at
charge_created_at.comment: The date and time the charge was created.

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.comment: The unique identifier of the customer.

address_id.name: address_id
address_id.comment: The unique identifier of the address.

amount.name: amount
amount.comment: The amount charged for the line item.

title.name: title
title.comment: The title of the line item.

line_item_type.name: line_item_type
line_item_type.comment: The type of the line item. Possible values are (charge line, discount, shipping, tax, or refund).

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: recharge__customer_daily_rollup
metadata.comment: Each record provides totals and running totals for a customer's associated transaction for the specified day.

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.comment: The unique identifier of the customer.

no_of_orders.name: no_of_orders
no_of_orders.comment: The number of orders for the customer on the given day.

recurring_orders.name: recurring_orders
recurring_orders.comment: The number of subscriptions created for the customer on the given day.

one_time_orders.name: one_time_orders
one_time_orders.comment: The number of one-time orders for the customer on the given day.

total_charges.name: total_charges
total_charges.comment: The total amount charges associated with the customer on the given day.

charge_total_price_realized.name: charge_total_price_realized
charge_total_price_realized.comment: Total price for successful orders by the customer on the given day.

charge_total_discounts_realized.name: charge_total_discounts_realized
charge_total_discounts_realized.comment: Total discounts for successful orders by the customer on the given day.

charge_total_tax_realized.name: charge_total_tax_realized
charge_total_tax_realized.comment: Total tax for successful orders by the customer on the given day.

charge_total_refunds_realized.name: charge_total_refunds_realized
charge_total_refunds_realized.comment: Total refunds for successful orders by the customer on the given day.

calculated_order_total_discounts_realize.name: calculated_order_total_discounts_realized
calculated_order_total_discounts_realize.comment: The `charge_total_discounts_realized` divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

calculated_order_total_tax_realized.name: calculated_order_total_tax_realized
calculated_order_total_tax_realized.comment: The `charge_total_tax_realized` divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

calculated_order_total_price_realized.name: calculated_order_total_price_realized
calculated_order_total_price_realized.comment: The `charge_total_price_realized` divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

calculated_order_total_refunds_realized.name: calculated_order_total_refunds_realized
calculated_order_total_refunds_realized.comment: The `charge_total_refunds_realized` divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

order_line_item_total_realized.name: order_line_item_total_realized
order_line_item_total_realized.comment: Order line item total for successful orders by the customer on the given day.

order_item_quantity_realized.name: order_item_quantity_realized
order_item_quantity_realized.comment: Total number of items successfully ordered by the customer on the given day.

charge_recurring_net_amount_realized.name: charge_recurring_net_amount_realized
charge_recurring_net_amount_realized.comment: The total net value of recurring charges, calculated as the total price minus total discounts.

charge_one_time_net_amount_realized.name: charge_one_time_net_amount_realized
charge_one_time_net_amount_realized.comment: The total net value of one-time charges, calculated as the total price minus total discounts.

calculated_order_recurring_net_amount_re.name: calculated_order_recurring_net_amount_realized
calculated_order_recurring_net_amount_re.comment: The `charge_recurring_net_amount_realized` divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

calculated_order_one_time_net_amount_rea.name: calculated_order_one_time_net_amount_realized
calculated_order_one_time_net_amount_rea.comment: The `charge_one_time_net_amount_realized` divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

charge_total_price_running_total.name: charge_total_price_running_total
charge_total_price_running_total.comment: Running total of price for successful orders by the customer.

charge_total_discounts_running_total.name: charge_total_discounts_running_total
charge_total_discounts_running_total.comment: Running total of discounts for successful orders by the customer.

charge_total_tax_running_total.name: charge_total_tax_running_total
charge_total_tax_running_total.comment: Running total of tax for successful orders by the customer.

charge_total_refunds_running_total.name: charge_total_refunds_running_total
charge_total_refunds_running_total.comment: Running total of refunds for successful orders by the customer.

calculated_order_total_discounts_running.name: calculated_order_total_discounts_running_total
calculated_order_total_discounts_running.comment: The `charge_total_discounts_running_total` divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

calculated_order_total_tax_running_total.name: calculated_order_total_tax_running_total
calculated_order_total_tax_running_total.comment: The `charge_total_tax_running_total` divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

calculated_order_total_price_running_tot.name: calculated_order_total_price_running_total
calculated_order_total_price_running_tot.comment: The `charge_total_price_running_total` divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

calculated_order_total_refunds_running_t.name: calculated_order_total_refunds_running_total
calculated_order_total_refunds_running_t.comment: The `charge_total_refunds_running_total` divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

order_line_item_total_running_total.name: order_line_item_total_running_total
order_line_item_total_running_total.comment: Order line item running total for successful orders by the customer.

order_item_quantity_running_total.name: order_item_quantity_running_total
order_item_quantity_running_total.comment: Running total of items successfully ordered by the customer.

charge_recurring_net_amount_running_tota.name: charge_recurring_net_amount_running_total
charge_recurring_net_amount_running_tota.comment: Running total of the net value of recurring charges.

charge_one_time_net_amount_running_total.name: charge_one_time_net_amount_running_total
charge_one_time_net_amount_running_total.comment: Running total of the net value of one-time charges.

calculated_order_recurring_net_amount_ru.name: calculated_order_recurring_net_amount_running_total
calculated_order_recurring_net_amount_ru.comment: Running total of the net value of the calculated recurring order amount.

calculated_order_one_time_net_amount_run.name: calculated_order_one_time_net_amount_running_total
calculated_order_one_time_net_amount_run.comment: Running total of the net value of the calculated one-time order amount.

active_months_to_date.name: active_months_to_date
active_months_to_date.comment: The number of months the customer has been active up to the given day.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: recharge__customer_details
metadata.comment: Each record represents a customer, enriched with metrics about their associated transactions.

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.comment: The unique identifier of the customer.

customer_hash.name: customer_hash
customer_hash.comment: The unique string identifier used in a customer portal link.

external_customer_id_ecommerce.name: external_customer_id_ecommerce
external_customer_id_ecommerce.comment: The ID for the customer in your external ecommerce platform.

email.name: email
email.comment: The email address of the customer.

customer_created_at.name: customer_created_at
customer_created_at.comment: The date and time the customer was created.

customer_updated_at.name: customer_updated_at
customer_updated_at.comment: The date and time the customer was last updated.

first_charge_processed_at.name: first_charge_processed_at
first_charge_processed_at.comment: The date and time of the customer's first processed charge.

subscriptions_active_count.name: subscriptions_active_count
subscriptions_active_count.comment: The number of active subscriptions associated with the customer.

subscriptions_total_count.name: subscriptions_total_count
subscriptions_total_count.comment: The total number of subscriptions associated with the customer.

has_valid_payment_method.name: has_valid_payment_method
has_valid_payment_method.comment: Boolean indicating if the payment value is valid.

has_payment_method_in_dunning.name: has_payment_method_in_dunning
has_payment_method_in_dunning.comment: Boolean indicating if the customer has a credit card in dunning.

tax_exempt.name: tax_exempt
tax_exempt.comment: Boolean indicating if the customer is tax exempt.

billing_first_name.name: billing_first_name
billing_first_name.comment: First name associated with the billing details.

billing_last_name.name: billing_last_name
billing_last_name.comment: Last name associated with the billing details.

billing_company.name: billing_company
billing_company.comment: Company associated with the billing details.

billing_city.name: billing_city
billing_city.comment: City associated with the billing details.

billing_country.name: billing_country
billing_country.comment: Country associated with the billing details.

_fivetran_deleted.name: _fivetran_deleted
_fivetran_deleted.comment: Boolean created by Fivetran to indicate whether the record has been deleted.

total_orders.name: total_orders
total_orders.comment: The total number of orders associated with the customer.

total_amount_ordered.name: total_amount_ordered
total_amount_ordered.comment: The total amount associated with the customer.

avg_order_amount.name: avg_order_amount
avg_order_amount.comment: The average order amount for the customer.

total_order_line_item_total.name: total_order_line_item_total
total_order_line_item_total.comment: The total price of all line items in the customer's orders.

avg_order_line_item_total.name: avg_order_line_item_total
avg_order_line_item_total.comment: The average price of line items in the customer's orders.

avg_item_quantity_per_order.name: avg_item_quantity_per_order
avg_item_quantity_per_order.comment: The average quantity of items per order for the customer.

total_amount_charged.name: total_amount_charged
total_amount_charged.comment: The total amount charged to the customer.

avg_amount_charged.name: avg_amount_charged
avg_amount_charged.comment: The average amount charged to the customer.

charges_count.name: charges_count
charges_count.comment: The total number of charges made to the customer.

total_amount_taxed.name: total_amount_taxed
total_amount_taxed.comment: The total amount of tax applied to the customer's orders.

total_amount_discounted.name: total_amount_discounted
total_amount_discounted.comment: The total amount of discounts applied to the customer's orders.

total_refunds.name: total_refunds
total_refunds.comment: The total refunds issued for the customer.

total_one_time_purchases.name: total_one_time_purchases
total_one_time_purchases.comment: The total number of one-time purchases made by the customer.

total_net_spend.name: total_net_spend
total_net_spend.comment: The total net spend of the customer, calculated as the total amount charged minus total refunds.

calculated_subscriptions_active_count.name: calculated_subscriptions_active_count
calculated_subscriptions_active_count.comment: The number of active subscriptions for the customer, calculated as the sum of subscriptions with status ACTIVE.  Note - this value may differ from the Recharge-provided subscriptions_active_count. See DECISIONLOG for more information.

is_currently_subscribed.name: is_currently_subscribed
is_currently_subscribed.comment: Indicates whether the customer currently has an active subscription.

is_new_customer.name: is_new_customer
is_new_customer.comment: Indicates whether the customer has made their first charge in the past 30 days.

active_months.name: active_months
active_months.comment: The number of months since making their first charge.

orders_monthly_average.name: orders_monthly_average
orders_monthly_average.comment: The monthly average number of orders placed by the customer.

amount_ordered_monthly_average.name: amount_ordered_monthly_average
amount_ordered_monthly_average.comment: The monthly average amount ordered by the customer.

one_time_purchases_monthly_average.name: one_time_purchases_monthly_average
one_time_purchases_monthly_average.comment: The monthly average number of one-time purchases made by the customer.

amount_charged_monthly_average.name: amount_charged_monthly_average
amount_charged_monthly_average.comment: The monthly average amount charged to the customer.

amount_discounted_monthly_average.name: amount_discounted_monthly_average
amount_discounted_monthly_average.comment: The monthly average amount discounted for the customer.

amount_taxed_monthly_average.name: amount_taxed_monthly_average
amount_taxed_monthly_average.comment: The monthly average amount taxed for the customer.

net_spend_monthly_average.name: net_spend_monthly_average
net_spend_monthly_average.comment: The monthly average net spend of the customer, calculated as the total amount charged minus total refunds, divided by the number of months since the first charge.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: recharge__line_item_enhanced
metadata.comment: This model constructs a comprehensive, denormalized analytical table that enables reporting on key revenue, subscription, customer, and product metrics from your billing platform. It’s designed to align with the schema of the `*__line_item_enhanced` model found in Recharge, Recurly, Stripe, Shopify, and Zuora, offering standardized reporting across various billing platforms. To see the kinds of insights this model can generate, explore example visualizations in the [Fivetran Billing Model Streamlit App](https://fivetran-billing-model.streamlit.app/). Visit the app for more details.

line_item_id.name: line_item_id
line_item_id.comment: ID of either the charge line item.

line_item_index.name: line_item_index
line_item_index.comment: Numerical identifier of the line item within the header object.

record_type.name: record_type
record_type.comment: Either 'header' or 'line_item' to differentiate if the record is originally from the line item table or was created to document information only available at the header level.

created_at.name: created_at
created_at.comment: Date the line item entry was created.

currency.name: currency
currency.comment: Determines the currency in which the checkout took place.

header_status.name: header_status
header_status.comment: Indicates the status of the header. Eg. paid, voided, returned.

product_id.name: product_id
product_id.comment: ID of the product associated with the line item.

product_name.name: product_name
product_name.comment: Name of the product associated with the line item.

transaction_type.name: transaction_type
transaction_type.comment: Transaction type of the line item (e.g., subscription, onetime).

billing_type.name: billing_type
billing_type.comment: Billing type of the charge (e.g., checkout, recurring).

product_type.name: product_type
product_type.comment: Type of the product (e.g., physical, digital).

quantity.name: quantity
quantity.comment: Quantity of the product in the line item.

discount_amount.name: discount_amount
discount_amount.comment: Amount of discount applied to the charge.

tax_amount.name: tax_amount
tax_amount.comment: Amount of tax applied to the line item.

total_amount.name: total_amount
total_amount.comment: Total amount for the line item (including tax and discounts).

payment_id.name: payment_id
payment_id.comment: ID of the payment associated with the line item.

payment_method.name: payment_method
payment_method.comment: Method used for payment (e.g., credit card, PayPal).

payment_at.name: payment_at
payment_at.comment: Date and time of the payment.

fee_amount.name: fee_amount
fee_amount.comment: Shipping fees associated with the charge.

subscription_plan.name: subscription_plan
subscription_plan.comment: The product title associated with the subscription.

subscription_period_started_at.name: subscription_period_started_at
subscription_period_started_at.comment: Start date of the subscription period (if applicable).

subscription_period_ended_at.name: subscription_period_ended_at
subscription_period_ended_at.comment: End date of the subscription period (if applicable).

customer_created_at.name: customer_created_at
customer_created_at.comment: Date the customer was created in Recharge.

customer_level.name: customer_level
customer_level.comment: Identifies if the customer is reported at the account or customer level.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: recharge__monthly_recurring_revenue
metadata.comment: Each record represents a customer, MRR, and non-MRR generated on a monthly basis.

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.comment: The unique identifier of the customer.

recurring_orders.name: recurring_orders
recurring_orders.comment: The number of successful recurring orders counted in the month.

total_net_recurring_charges.name: total_net_recurring_charges
total_net_recurring_charges.comment: The current net monthly recurring revenue for the customer based on charges, taking into account discounts and refunds.

calculated_net_order_mrr.name: calculated_net_order_mrr
calculated_net_order_mrr.comment: The current net monthly recurring revenue for the customer based on orders, taking into account discounts and refunds. This is the recurring charges divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

one_time_orders.name: one_time_orders
one_time_orders.comment: The number of successful one-time orders counted in the month.

total_net_one_time_charges.name: total_net_one_time_charges
total_net_one_time_charges.comment: The current net monthly one-time revenue for the customer based on charges, taking into account discounts and refunds.

calculated_net_order_one_times.name: calculated_net_order_one_times
calculated_net_order_one_times.comment: The current net monthly one-time revenue for the customer based on orders, taking into account discounts and refunds. This is the one-time charges divided equally amongst all orders stemming from the same charge.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: recharge__subscription_overview
metadata.comment: Each record represents a subscription, enriched with customer and charge information.

subscription_id.name: subscription_id
subscription_id.comment: The unique identifier of the subscription.

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.comment: The unique identifier of the customer.

address_id.name: address_id
address_id.comment: The unique identifier of the address.

subscription_created_at.name: subscription_created_at
subscription_created_at.comment: The date and time the subscription was created.

external_product_id_ecommerce.name: external_product_id_ecommerce
external_product_id_ecommerce.comment: The ID of the product in your external ecommerce platform.

external_variant_id_ecommerce.name: external_variant_id_ecommerce
external_variant_id_ecommerce.comment: The ID of the variant in your external ecommerce platform.

product_title.name: product_title
product_title.comment: The name of the product in a shop's catalog.

variant_title.name: variant_title
variant_title.comment: The name of the variant in a shop's catalog.

sku.name: sku
sku.comment: The unique identifier of the item in fulfillment.

price.name: price
price.comment: The price of the item before discounts, taxes, or shipping have been applied.

quantity.name: quantity
quantity.comment: The number of items in the subscription.

subscription_status.name: subscription_status
subscription_status.comment: The status of the subscription. Possible values are ACTIVE, CANCELLED, EXPIRED.

charge_interval_frequency.name: charge_interval_frequency
charge_interval_frequency.comment: The number of units (specified in order_interval_unit) between each charge.

order_interval_unit.name: order_interval_unit
order_interval_unit.comment: The frequency with which a subscription should have the order created with (valid values are “day”, “week”, and “month”).

order_interval_frequency.name: order_interval_frequency
order_interval_frequency.comment: The number of units (specified in order_interval_unit) between each order.

order_day_of_month.name: order_day_of_month
order_day_of_month.comment: The set day of the month order is created. Default is that there isn’t a strict day of the month when the order is created.

order_day_of_week.name: order_day_of_week
order_day_of_week.comment: The set day of the week order is created. Default is that there isn’t a strict day of the week order is created.

expire_after_specific_number_of_charges.name: expire_after_specific_number_of_charges
expire_after_specific_number_of_charges.comment: Set number of charges until subscription expires.

subscription_updated_at.name: subscription_updated_at
subscription_updated_at.comment: The date and time the subscription was last updated.

subscription_next_charge_scheduled_at.name: subscription_next_charge_scheduled_at
subscription_next_charge_scheduled_at.comment: The date and time of the next scheduled charge for the subscription.

subscription_cancelled_at.name: subscription_cancelled_at
subscription_cancelled_at.comment: The date and time the subscription was cancelled.

cancellation_reason_comments.name: cancellation_reason_comments
cancellation_reason_comments.comment: Additional comments related to the cancellation of the subscription.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: Timestamp of when Fivetran synced a record.

is_most_recent_record.name: is_most_recent_record
is_most_recent_record.comment: A flag indicating if the record is the most recent for the subscription.

count_successful_charges.name: count_successful_charges
count_successful_charges.comment: The count of successful charges for the subscription.

count_queued_charges.name: count_queued_charges
count_queued_charges.comment: The count of queued charges for the subscription.

charges_until_expiration.name: charges_until_expiration
charges_until_expiration.comment: The number of charges until the subscription expires.

charge_interval_frequency_days.name: charge_interval_frequency_days
charge_interval_frequency_days.comment: The number of days between charges for the subscription.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_recharge__address
metadata.comment: Table of all addresses, an address represents a shipping address. Each customer can have multiple addresses, subscriptions are a child object of an address.

address_id.name: address_id
address_id.comment: The unique identifier of the address.

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.comment: The unique identifier of the customer.

address_created_at.name: address_created_at
address_created_at.comment: The date and time the customer address was recorded.

address_updated_at.name: address_updated_at
address_updated_at.comment: The date and time of when the customer's address record was last updated.

address_line_1.name: address_line_1
address_line_1.comment: The first line of the customer's address.

address_line_2.name: address_line_2
address_line_2.comment: Any additional address information associated with the customer.

city.name: city
city.comment: The city associated with the customer.

province.name: province
province.comment: The province or state name associated with the customer.

zip.name: zip
zip.comment: The zip or post code associated with the customer.

country_code.name: country_code
country_code.comment: The country code associated with the address.

company.name: company
company.comment: The company name associated with the customer.

phone.name: phone
phone.comment: The phone number associated with the customer.

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

index.name: index
index.comment: A unique numeric row produced for every concurrent address_id.

price.name: price

code.name: code

metadata.name: stg_recharge__charge
metadata.comment: Table of all charges (financial transactions) linked to the purchase of an item. A charge is linked to a corresponding order, an order is created once the corresponding charge is successful.

charge_id.name: charge_id
charge_id.comment: The unique identifier of the charge.

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.comment: The unique identifier of the customer.

customer_hash.name: customer_hash
customer_hash.comment: The hash of the customer associated with the charge.

email.name: email
email.comment: The email address of the customer.

charge_created_at.name: charge_created_at
charge_created_at.comment: Date and time when the charge was created.

charge_status.name: charge_status
charge_status.comment: The status of the charge. Possible values are SUCCESS, ERROR, QUEUED, SKIPPED, REFUNDED, PARTIALLY_REFUNDED.

charge_updated_at.name: charge_updated_at
charge_updated_at.comment: Date and time when the charge was last updated.

note.name: note
note.comment: Shows the next order in sequence.

subtotal_price.name: subtotal_price
subtotal_price.comment: The combined price of all line_items without taxes and shipping.

tax_lines.name: tax_lines
tax_lines.comment: An array of tax lines that apply to the charge.

total_discounts.name: total_discounts
total_discounts.comment: The sum of the discounts applied to the charge.

total_line_items_price.name: total_line_items_price
total_line_items_price.comment: The sum of all the prices of all the items in the charge.

total_tax.name: total_tax
total_tax.comment: The total tax due associated with the charge.

total_price.name: total_price
total_price.comment: The sum of all the prices of all the items in the charge, taxes and discounts included (must be positive).

total_refunds.name: total_refunds
total_refunds.comment: The sum of all refunds that were applied to the charge.

total_weight_grams.name: total_weight_grams
total_weight_grams.comment: The total weight of all items in the charge in grams.

charge_scheduled_at.name: charge_scheduled_at
charge_scheduled_at.comment: The date time of when the associated charge is/was scheduled to process.

charge_processed_at.name: charge_processed_at
charge_processed_at.comment: Date and time when the charge was processed.

payment_processor.name: payment_processor
payment_processor.comment: The payment processor used on the charge.

external_transaction_id_payment_processo.name: external_transaction_id_payment_processor
external_transaction_id_payment_processo.comment: The unique alphanumeric identifier of the transaction.

external_order_id_ecommerce.name: external_order_id_ecommerce
external_order_id_ecommerce.comment: The unique numeric identifier within your external ecommerce platform for the charge.

orders_count.name: orders_count
orders_count.comment: The number of orders generated from this charge (Will be >1 for prepaid).

has_uncommitted_changes.name: has_uncommitted_changes
has_uncommitted_changes.comment: Specifies whether the charge is scheduled for regeneration (if the subscription is related to the charge was updated in the last 5 seconds using "commit_update":false).

retry_date.name: retry_date
retry_date.comment: The date when the next attempt will be placed.

error_type.name: error_type
error_type.comment: Structured reason why the charge failed such as customer_needs_to_updated_card.

times_retried.name: times_retried
times_retried.comment: Shows how many times an attempt to charge was placed.

address_id.name: address_id
address_id.comment: The unique identifier of the address.

client_details_browser_ip.name: client_details_browser_ip
client_details_browser_ip.comment: The IP address of the buyer detected in checkout.

client_details_user_agent.name: client_details_user_agent
client_details_user_agent.comment: The user agent detected during checkout.

tags.name: tags
tags.comment: A comma-separated list of tags on the charge.

error.name: error
error.comment: Error reason as sentence text (typically returned directly from the payment processor - e.g. "customer needs to update credit card").

external_variant_id_not_found.name: external_variant_id_not_found
external_variant_id_not_found.comment: Indicates if Recharge was able to find the external_variant_id_ecommerce from the charge.

_fivetran_deleted.name: _fivetran_deleted
_fivetran_deleted.comment: Boolean created by Fivetran to indicate whether the record has been deleted.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.comment: Table of all charge discount codes.

charge_id.name: charge_id

index.name: index
index.comment: A unique numeric row produced for every concurrent charge_id.

discount_id.name: discount_id
discount_id.comment: The ID of the discount associated with the charge.

code.name: code
code.comment: The code used to apply the discount.

discount_value.name: discount_value
discount_value.comment: The discounted value to be applied.

metadata.name: stg_recharge__charge_line_item
metadata.comment: Table of all charge line items, each containing information about a distinct purchase item.

charge_id.name: charge_id
charge_id.comment: The unique identifier of the charge.

index.name: index
index.comment: A unique numeric row produced for every concurrent charge_id.

title.name: title
title.comment: The product title that links to your external ecommerce platform.

variant_title.name: variant_title
variant_title.comment: The name of the product variant.

sku.name: sku
sku.comment: The SKU (stock keeping unit) of the product associated with the charge's line item.

grams.name: grams
grams.comment: The weight of the charge's line item in grams.

total_price.name: total_price
total_price.comment: The total price of the line_item including tax.

unit_price.name: unit_price
unit_price.comment: The unit price of the line_item.

tax_due.name: tax_due
tax_due.comment: The total tax due associated with the line_item.

taxable.name: taxable
taxable.comment: A boolean indicating if the line_item is taxable or non-taxable.

taxable_amount.name: taxable_amount
taxable_amount.comment: The taxable revenue associated with the line_item.

unit_price_includes_tax.name: unit_price_includes_tax
unit_price_includes_tax.comment: A boolean indicator if tax is included in the price of an item.

external_product_id_ecommerce.name: external_product_id_ecommerce
external_product_id_ecommerce.comment: The product ID that links to your external ecommerce platform.

external_variant_id_ecommerce.name: external_variant_id_ecommerce
external_variant_id_ecommerce.comment: The variant ID that links to your external ecommerce platform.

purchase_item_id.name: purchase_item_id
purchase_item_id.comment: The subscription or onetime ID associated with the line_item.

metadata.name: stg_recharge__checkout
metadata.comment: checkouts

charge_id.name: charge_id
charge_id.comment: ID for the Charge resulting from processing the Checkout.

buyer_accepts_marketing.name: buyer_accepts_marketing
buyer_accepts_marketing.comment: Boolean if the buyer accept marketing, newsletters etc.

checkout_completed_at.name: checkout_completed_at
checkout_completed_at.comment: Timestamp for when the Checkout was processed.

checkout_created_at.name: checkout_created_at
checkout_created_at.comment: Timestamp for when the Checkout was created.

discount_code.name: discount_code
discount_code.comment: Discount code to be used on the checkout, e.g. “DISCOUNT20”.

external_transaction_id_payment_processo.name: external_transaction_id_payment_processor
external_transaction_id_payment_processo.comment: Transaction ID of the external payment processor.

requires_shipping.name: requires_shipping
requires_shipping.comment: Boolean if the Checkout contains items that require shipping.

subtotal_price.name: subtotal_price
subtotal_price.comment: Value of the Checkout minus shipping and tax.

taxes_included.name: taxes_included
taxes_included.comment: Boolean if the tax is included in the price of the items.

total_price.name: total_price
total_price.comment: Full price of the Checkout including shipping and tax.

checkout_updated_at.name: checkout_updated_at
checkout_updated_at.comment: Timestamp for the latest Checkout update.

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_recharge__customer
metadata.comment: Table of all customer details holding account and billing information. Email is unique on the customer, no two customers for a store can have the same email.

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.comment: The unique identifier of the customer.

customer_hash.name: customer_hash
customer_hash.comment: The unique string identifier used in a customer portal link.

external_customer_id_ecommerce.name: external_customer_id_ecommerce
external_customer_id_ecommerce.comment: External platform's identifier for the customer.

email.name: email
email.comment: The email address of the customer.

customer_created_at.name: customer_created_at
customer_created_at.comment: The date and time when the customer was created.

customer_updated_at.name: customer_updated_at
customer_updated_at.comment: The date and time when the customer was last updated.

first_charge_processed_at.name: first_charge_processed_at
first_charge_processed_at.comment: Date when first charge was processed for the customer.

subscriptions_active_count.name: subscriptions_active_count
subscriptions_active_count.comment: The number of active subscriptions associated with the customer.

subscriptions_total_count.name: subscriptions_total_count
subscriptions_total_count.comment: The total number of subscriptions associated with the customer.

has_valid_payment_method.name: has_valid_payment_method
has_valid_payment_method.comment: Boolean indicating if the payment value is valid.

has_payment_method_in_dunning.name: has_payment_method_in_dunning
has_payment_method_in_dunning.comment: Boolean indicating if the customer has a credit card in dunning.

tax_exempt.name: tax_exempt
tax_exempt.comment: Boolean indicating if the customer is tax exempt.

billing_first_name.name: billing_first_name
billing_first_name.comment: First name associated with the billing details.

billing_last_name.name: billing_last_name
billing_last_name.comment: Last name associated with the billing details.

billing_company.name: billing_company
billing_company.comment: Company associated with the billing details.

billing_city.name: billing_city
billing_city.comment: City associated with the billing details.

billing_country.name: billing_country
billing_country.comment: Country associated with the billing details.

_fivetran_deleted.name: _fivetran_deleted
_fivetran_deleted.comment: Boolean created by Fivetran to indicate whether the record has been deleted.

has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_recharge__discount
metadata.comment: Table of discounts that can be applied to a checkout, or that can be directly applied to an address.

discount_id.name: discount_id
discount_id.comment: Unique numeric identifier for the discount in Recharge.

discount_created_at.name: discount_created_at
discount_created_at.comment: The date and time when the discount was created.

discount_updated_at.name: discount_updated_at
discount_updated_at.comment: The date and time when the discount was last updated.

discount_starts_at.name: discount_starts_at
discount_starts_at.comment: The date when the discount becomes active.

discount_ends_at.name: discount_ends_at
discount_ends_at.comment: The expiration time of the discount, past this time the discount can no longer be redeemed, once the time of the discount has passed the status of the discount will go from 'active' to 'disabled'.

code.name: code
code.comment: The code used to apply the discount.

value.name: value
value.comment: The discounted value to be applied.

status.name: status
status.comment: The status of the discount. Possible values are ENABLED, DISABLED, or FULLY_DISABLED.

usage_limits.name: usage_limits
usage_limits.comment: An integer indicating how many times the discount can been used.

applies_to_resource.name: applies_to_resource
applies_to_resource.comment: An indicator of the type of resource which applies_to_id refers.

applies_to_product_type.name: applies_to_product_type
applies_to_product_type.comment: Indicates which product types the discount applies to.

minimum_order_amount.name: minimum_order_amount
minimum_order_amount.comment: The minimum cart subtotal needed for the discount to be applicable. `duration` has to be `single_use` and the discount must apply to the entire order.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

address_id.comment: The unique identifier of the address. Cannot be used with `next_charge_scheduled_at`.

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.comment: Unique numeric identifier for the customer the onetime purchase is tied to.

_fivetran_deleted.name: _fivetran_deleted
_fivetran_deleted.comment: Boolean created by Fivetran to indicate whether the record has been deleted.

one_time_created_at.name: one_time_created_at
one_time_created_at.comment: The time the onetime item was first created.

one_time_updated_at.name: one_time_updated_at
one_time_updated_at.comment: The time the onetime item was last updated.

one_time_next_charge_scheduled_at.name: one_time_next_charge_scheduled_at
one_time_next_charge_scheduled_at.comment: Date of the onetime purchase execution.

product_title.name: product_title
product_title.comment: The name of the product in a shop's catalog.

variant_title.name: variant_title
variant_title.comment: The name of the variant in a shop's catalog.

price.name: price
price.comment: The price of the item before discounts, taxes, or shipping have been applied.

quantity.name: quantity
quantity.comment: The number of items in the onetime purchase.

external_product_id_ecommerce.name: external_product_id_ecommerce
external_product_id_ecommerce.comment: The product ID that links to your external ecommerce platform.

external_variant_id_ecommerce.name: external_variant_id_ecommerce
external_variant_id_ecommerce.comment: The variant ID that links to your external ecommerce platform.

sku.name: sku
sku.comment: The unique identifier of the item in fulfillment.

external_order_number_ecommerce.comment: The unique order number within your external ecommerce platform.

charge_status.comment: The status of the charge. Possible values are SUCCESS, ERROR, QUEUED, SKIPPED, REFUNDED, PARTIALLY_REFUNDED.

order_scheduled_at.name: order_scheduled_at
order_scheduled_at.comment: The date and time when the order will be shipped.

order_shipped_date.name: order_shipped_date

subscription_id.comment: The unique identifier of the subscription.

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.comment: The unique identifier of the customer.

address_id.name: address_id
address_id.comment: The unique identifier of the address.

subscription_created_at.name: subscription_created_at
subscription_created_at.comment: The date and time when the subscription was created.

product_title.name: product_title
product_title.comment: The name of the product in a shop's catalog.

variant_title.name: variant_title
variant_title.comment: The name of the variant in a shop's catalog.

sku.name: sku
sku.comment: A unique identifier of the item in fulfillment.

price.name: price
price.comment: The price of the item before discounts, taxes, or shipping have been applied.

quantity.name: quantity
quantity.comment: The number of items in the subscription.

subscription_status.name: subscription_status
subscription_status.comment: The status of the subscription; active = the subscription is active, cancelled = the subscription has been cancelled, expired = the subscription has expired - this occurs when the maximum number of charges for product have been reached.

subscription_next_charge_scheduled_at.name: subscription_next_charge_scheduled_at
subscription_next_charge_scheduled_at.comment: Date of the next charge for the subscription.

charge_interval_frequency.name: charge_interval_frequency
charge_interval_frequency.comment: The number of units (specified in order_interval_unit) between each charge.

expire_after_specific_number_of_charges.name: expire_after_specific_number_of_charges
expire_after_specific_number_of_charges.comment: Set the number of charges until subscription expires.

order_interval_frequency.name: order_interval_frequency
order_interval_frequency.comment: The number of units (specified in order_interval_unit) between each order, e.g. order_interval_unit = 'month' and order_interval frequency = 3 indicates an order every 3 months.

order_interval_unit.name: order_interval_unit
order_interval_unit.comment: The frequency with which a subscription should have the order created with (valid values are “day”, “week”, and “month”).

order_day_of_week.name: order_day_of_week
order_day_of_week.comment: The set day of the week order is created. Default is that there isn’t a strict day of the week order is created.

order_day_of_month.name: order_day_of_month
order_day_of_month.comment: The set day of the month order is created. Default is that there isn’t a strict day of the month when the order is created.

subscription_updated_at.name: subscription_updated_at
subscription_updated_at.comment: The date and time when the subscription was created.

external_product_id_ecommerce.name: external_product_id_ecommerce
external_product_id_ecommerce.comment: Unique numeric identifier of the product in your external ecommerce platform.

external_variant_id_ecommerce.name: external_variant_id_ecommerce
external_variant_id_ecommerce.comment: Unique numeric identifier of the product variant in your external ecommerce platform.

subscription_cancelled_at.name: subscription_cancelled_at
subscription_cancelled_at.comment: The date and time when the subscription was cancelled.

has_stats.label: Has Stats?
has_stats.description: Indicates whether there are statistics for this table

metadata.name: stg_recharge__subscription_history
metadata.comment: History table that builds over time. Does not capture history prior to connecting Fivetran.

subscription_id.name: subscription_id
subscription_id.comment: The unique identifier of the subscription.

customer_id.name: customer_id
customer_id.comment: The unique identifier of the customer.

address_id.name: address_id
address_id.comment: The unique identifier of the address.

subscription_created_at.name: subscription_created_at
subscription_created_at.comment: The date and time the subscription was created.

external_product_id_ecommerce.name: external_product_id_ecommerce
external_product_id_ecommerce.comment: An object containing the product id as it appears in external platforms.

external_variant_id_ecommerce.name: external_variant_id_ecommerce
external_variant_id_ecommerce.comment: An object containing the variant id as it appears in external platforms.

product_title.name: product_title
product_title.comment: The name of the product in a store’s catalog.

variant_title.name: variant_title
variant_title.comment: The name of the variant in a shop’s catalog.

sku.name: sku
sku.comment: A unique identifier of the item in the fulfillment. In cases where SKU is blank, it will be dynamically pulled whenever it is used.

price.name: price
price.comment: The price of the item before discounts, taxes, or shipping have been applied.

quantity.name: quantity
quantity.comment: The number of items in the subscription.

charge_interval_frequency.name: charge_interval_frequency
charge_interval_frequency.comment: The number of units (specified in order_interval_unit) between each Charge. For example, order_interval_unit=month and charge_interval_frequency=3, indicate charge every 3 months.

order_interval_unit.name: order_interval_unit
order_interval_unit.comment: The frequency unit used to determine when a subscription’s order is created.

order_interval_frequency.name: order_interval_frequency
order_interval_frequency.comment: The number of units (specified in order_interval_unit) between each order.

order_day_of_month.name: order_day_of_month
order_day_of_month.comment: The set day of the month order is created. Default is that there isn’t a strict day of the month when the order is created.

order_day_of_week.name: order_day_of_week
order_day_of_week.comment: The set day of the week order is created. Default is that there isn’t a strict day of the week order is created.

expire_after_specific_number_of_charges.name: expire_after_specific_number_of_charges
expire_after_specific_number_of_charges.comment: Set number of charges until subscription expires.

subscription_updated_at.name: subscription_updated_at
subscription_updated_at.comment: The date time at which the purchase_item record was last updated.

subscription_next_charge_scheduled_at.name: subscription_next_charge_scheduled_at
subscription_next_charge_scheduled_at.comment: Date of the next charge for the subscription.

subscription_cancelled_at.name: subscription_cancelled_at
subscription_cancelled_at.comment: The date and time the subscription was cancelled.

_fivetran_synced.name: _fivetran_synced
_fivetran_synced.comment: Timestamp of when Fivetran synced a record.

is_most_recent_record.name: is_most_recent_record
is_most_recent_record.comment: Boolean indicating whether record was the most recent instance.
